title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology discusses OpenClaw security risks in autonomous AI agents, covering vulnerabilities including prompt injection and credential exposure. The video examines how agent autonomy, tools, and memory create real-world security threats and explores safe usage approaches.
